creator: jaros@cnt.cz
text:
Port comms/p5-Device-Gsm is out of date more than half year.

more info:
http://cpansearch.perl.org/src/COSIMO/Device-Gsm-1.52/Changes

Fix: 

edit file /usr/ports/comms/p5-Device-Gsm/Makefile

- PORTVERSION=    1.49
+ PORTVERSION=    1.52
How-To-Repeat: grep "^PORTVERSION" /usr/ports/comms/p5-Device-Gsm/Makefile
